generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The primary motor component of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first vertical axis responsible for generating motion through cycloidal gear transmission"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The cycloidal gearbox component interfacing between motor output and robot axis, transmitting torque with high reduction ratio"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance PrimaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the motor shaft providing real-time angular position measurement for the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder positioned behind the gearbox measuring output angle with higher resolution for motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor measuring motor phase currents (I_M) for friction analysis and power monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured motor angle data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PrimaryEncoder
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured output angle data from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured input current data from motor phase sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from current and motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data from output angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration data from velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the first axis components: motor, gearboxes, and cycloidal gear assembly for structural analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computable model describing motor dynamics including electromagnetic and thermal characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearwheelBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computable model describing cycloidal gearwheel dynamics including load distribution and friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearboxBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computable model describing gearbox dynamics including backlash, stiffness, and friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulationEnabler
]

instance CoulombFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Coulomb friction characteristics for real-time identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance ViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing viscous friction characteristics for real-time identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Stribeck effect for dynamic friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured input current data from motor phase sensors for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured output angle data from encoder sensors for motion control verification"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCoulombData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction data using Coulomb friction model applied to reference motion for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedViscousData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction data using viscous friction model applied to reference motion for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from current and motor dynamics for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity data from output angle measurements for motion control validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration data from velocity measurements for motion dynamics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAccelerationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MATLABSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for creating and executing friction modeling simulations and data aggregation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombFrictionModel, ViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time friction analysis system for identifying and modeling friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring system for tracking physical relationships and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard implementation for real-time monitoring and visualization of robot motion dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DynamicModelRefinementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment system for friction models during operation based on live sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousModelRefinementService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification and modeling of friction characteristics (Coulomb, viscous, Stribeck) using combined white-box and black-box approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacteristicsInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring and visualization of physical relationships in the robot's first axis through dashboard interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionRelationshipInsight, PerformanceMetricsInsight
]

instance ContinuousModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models during operation to account for wear, temperature changes, or other operational variations"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveModelInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacteristicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Understanding of static, kinetic, and viscous friction dynamics and their impact on motion accuracy of the robot's first axis"
]

instance MotionRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of physical relationships between motor, gearboxes, and cycloidal gear in real-time operation"
]

instance PerformanceMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance metrics including position accuracy, velocity tracking, and acceleration consistency"
]

instance AdaptiveModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment capabilities for friction models to maintain optimal motion control during operation"
]

instance FrictionModelOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of friction compensation parameters in control algorithms based on real-time measurements"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Periodic validation of friction models against live sensor data to ensure accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, PrimaryEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StructuralModel, MotorBehaviorModel, GearwheelBehaviorModel, GearboxBehaviorModel,
                 CoulombFrictionModel, ViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel,
                 MeasuredInputCurrentData, MeasuredOutputAngleData, MeasuredTorqueData,
                 MeasuredVelocityData, MeasuredAccelerationData,
                 MATLABSimulationEnabler, FrictionAnalysisEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringEnabler,
                 DashboardVisualizationEnabler, DynamicModelRefinementEnabler,
                 FrictionAnalysisService, RealTimeMonitoringService, ContinuousModelRefinementService,
                 FrictionCharacteristicsInsight, MotionRelationshipInsight, PerformanceMetricsInsight,
                 AdaptiveModelInsight, FrictionModelOptimizationAction, ModelValidationAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time** with:
  - **Live data processing** for immediate friction identification and control adjustments.
  - **Continuous updates** during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, or application variations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is a **standalone component** focused on the first axis of the robot, orchestrating:
  - **Physical system**: Robot’s first axis (motor, gearboxes).
  - **Digital components**: Data traces, engineering/simulation models, and processing logic.
  - **Services**: Friction analysis, real-time monitoring, and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied during the **operated phase** of the robot, focusing on:
  - **As-operated** (real-time monitoring and adjustments for friction and motion accuracy).
  - **Not explicitly covering** designed (ideal) or manufactured phases, though structural and behavioral models are used for analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Includes:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - Comparison of simulated vs. measured data to validate friction models.
    - Traceability of data origins (e.g., sensor channels) for accuracy checks.
  - **Uncertainty/Errors**:
    - Friction models account for factors like load, temperature, and wear.
    - Backlash and positional uncertainty addressed via encoder differences."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses **MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport)** for one-way, real-time data streaming from sensors to the digital shadow. The system is designed for **automated, traceable data flow** with no explicit bidirectional communication or remote control capabilities."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed **locally on the robot’s infrastructure** (e.g., embedded processing units) with no centralized cloud deployment mentioned. The executable digital shadow runs on the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) or a dedicated processing node, with data visualization provided via a **dashboard** (implied but not explicitly specified)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital shadow integrates with **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for standardized data exchange, but no explicit mention of integration with external systems or other digital twins. The AAS enables future expansion but is not yet linked to broader enterprise systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses:
  - **SysML** for structural modeling.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for linking data and models.
  - **MATLAB/Simulink** for simulation (industry-standard tools)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety cell range restriction** to [-90°, 90°] to prevent overrange operations.
  - **Real-time monitoring** of friction and positional uncertainty to ensure safe operation.
  - No explicit mention of **remote operation** or **cybersecurity protocols**, but the system prioritizes **local, real-time processing** for safety-critical applications."
]
